known_issues: Admin Dashboard login redirect works in draft but fails in production — shows 'go to admin setup or return to home' instead of navigating to the dashboard

existing_features.title: Fix the admin login flow so that after successful authentication (via email/password, biometric, or Internet Identity), the user is reliably redirected to the Admin Dashboard page in production — not shown a 'Go to Admin Setup or Return to Home' fallback screen. The redirect logic must work consistently in both draft and production environments.

Investigate and fix the AdminGuard component to ensure it does not prematurely evaluate admin status before the actor and identity are fully initialized in production. If the identity or actor is not yet ready, the guard must show a loading state rather than falling through to the 'admin setup' screen.

Fix the AdminLoginPage post-login navigation to use a reliable programmatic redirect (e.g., router.navigate) to the admin dashboard route after all authentication methods succeed, ensuring the navigation fires after actor/identity state is fully settled — not before async state updates complete.

projectName: Fix Admin Dashboard redirect after login in production
